positive: A whimsical and stylish jungle parade featuring abstract, neon-colored exotic flora and stylized, chunky mythical beasts like bioluminescent jungle sloths and stylized macaws. The composition should be centered and highly decorative, using a clean silhouette aesthetic with deep shadows and vibrant pops of color (emerald green, sapphire blue, magenta, tangerine). Focus on complex pattern repeat potential, high contrast, linework, and strong visual impact, perfect for an apparel print. Tropical, abstract illustration, maximalist style, graphic design.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, watermark, signature, text, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed anatomy, logo, trademark, low resolution, bokeh, muted, desaturated, cartoonish, childish, messy
